strategy: He starts under an Invulnerability aura and is immune to all damage until you solve his four-digit code, so do not waste big hits early.
Kill his minions one at a time with SINGLE-TARGET spells. Never AoE the minions - an all-enemies hit makes him heal his whole team, himself included, back to full.
Each minion you defeat reveals one digit of the code; the first digit shows at the start of Round 2. The full four-number code is the sequence of spell pip-costs you must hit him with, in order.

Build your deck around matching pip-costs. The guide suggests splitting them across the team (one player packs 1-3 pip hits, another 4-6, and so on) or having everyone fill their sideboard with one hit per pip value. For a code like 4-7-3-11 you would hit with a 4-pip Kraken, then a 7-pip Frost Giant, then a 3-pip Sunbird, then an 11-pip Scion of Balance.
Cast the matching-cost hits in exact order; a wrong pip-cost, or attacking with a digit not yet revealed, resets you to the first number. Only ever attack with numbers already shown.
On the fourth correct hit he Supernovas himself and drops the aura. Blade up and finish with Death (he takes +5% Death, resists Life 70%).
cheatNotes: He is immune to all damage under this aura until you solve his pip-cost code, so do not waste big hits before it drops.
The code is four spell pip-costs, revealed one digit at Round 2 and one per minion killed; attack him with matching-cost spells in order.
On the fourth correct pip-cost hit he Supernovas himself and drops the invulnerability, so burst him down after.
A wrong pip-cost sends you back to the first digit, so only attack with numbers already revealed.
Attacking with an unrevealed number counts as wrong even if it would later be correct, so wait for each digit to show.
